Description: Minimum tap target size for interactive elements
Do: Minimum 44x44px (iOS) or 48x48dp (Android) for all tap targets.
Don't: Use 24px buttons — users miss taps and get frustrated
Code_Bad: <button class='p-1 text-xs'> — 20px target; untappable
A11y_Note: WCAG 2.5.5 requires 44x44px minimum for pointer targets.
Performance_Note: No performance impact — purely CSS sizing.

Description: Minimum spacing between adjacent tap targets
Do: Minimum 8px gap between tappable elements to prevent mis-taps.
Don't: Stack buttons with no gap — user taps wrong one
Code_Bad: — buttons touching; mis-tap = delete
A11y_Note: Spacing prevents accidental activation of adjacent targets.
Performance_Note: Pure CSS. No performance cost.

Description: Horizontal/vertical swipe for navigation or actions
Do: Provide visual affordance for swipeable content. Always offer button alternative.
Don't: Swipe-only actions with no visible trigger — undiscoverable
Code_Good:
Item
Delete
+ visible hint chevron
Code_Bad:
{item}
— no visual indicator swipe does anything
A11y_Note: Swipe actions MUST have button alternative for motor-impaired users.
Performance_Note: Use CSS transform for swipe animation — GPU accelerated.

Description: Press and hold to reveal contextual actions
Do: Show haptic feedback + action menu after 500ms hold. Cancel on move.
Don't: Long press with no visual/haptic feedback — user doesn't know to wait
Code_Bad: Long press with 2s delay and no feedback — user gives up at 800ms
A11y_Note: Long press is inaccessible to some users — provide 3-dot menu alternative.
Performance_Note: requestAnimationFrame for smooth menu appearance animation.

Description: Swipe down from top to refresh content
Do: Show spinner with pull distance indicator. Haptic on threshold. Debounce.
Don't: Trigger refresh on tiny pull — accidental refreshes
Code_Bad: Any downward touch triggers refresh — user can't scroll up
A11y_Note: Provide accessible refresh button for keyboard/switch users.
Performance_Note: Cancel refresh if pull < threshold. Debounce to prevent double.

Description: Respect device safe areas (notch/home indicator/status bar)
Do: Use env(safe-area-inset-*) for content placement. Avoid notch overlap.
Don't: Place content behind notch or home indicator — hidden/clipped
Code_Bad: Fixed bottom bar at bottom:0 — hidden behind home indicator on iPhone
A11y_Note: Safe areas ensure all content reachable by all users.
Performance_Note: env() is CSS native — zero JS cost. Add viewport-fit=cover meta tag.

Description: Modal sheet sliding up from bottom — native mobile pattern
Do: Allow drag to dismiss. 3 snap points: peek/half/full. Show drag handle.
Don't: Full-screen modal on mobile — feels like page navigation
Code_Bad: <div class='fixed inset-0 bg-white'> — full takeover; feels like new page
A11y_Note: Focus trap when open. Escape/swipe-down dismisses. aria-modal='true'.
Performance_Note: Transform-only animation for 60fps. Don't animate height.

Description: Full bleed content extending to screen edges on mobile
Do: Images and hero sections should go edge-to-edge. Text needs 16px padding.
Don't: Pad images same as text — wastes precious mobile screen space
Code_Bad: — image has unnecessary side padding
A11y_Note: Ensure edge-to-edge images have alt text.
Performance_Note: Full-width images use less layout calculation than padded.

Description: Reduce spacing on mobile vs desktop
Do: Use responsive spacing: gap-4 md:gap-6 lg:gap-8. Tighter on mobile.
Don't: Same large spacing on mobile — wastes 30% of small screen
Code_Bad: <div class='space-y-8'> on all breakpoints — too much space on mobile
A11y_Note: Spacing doesn't directly affect a11y but improves usability.
Performance_Note: Responsive Tailwind classes are compiled away — zero runtime cost.

Description: Primary navigation fixed at bottom of screen — thumb-reachable
Do: Max 5 tabs. Active state with color + label. Badge for notifications.
Don't: More than 5 tabs — target too small. Label all tabs not just active.
Code_Good: Home
Code_Bad: — icons only; no labels
A11y_Note: aria-current='page' on active tab. Labels on all tabs always.
Performance_Note: Fixed position elements cause repaint on scroll — use will-change:transform.

Description: Avoid conflicts with OS gestures (back swipe/home gesture)
Do: Don't place interactive elements in OS gesture zones (edges/bottom 34px).
Don't: Swipe actions on left/right edges — conflicts with iOS back gesture
Code_Good: Content area starts 16px from edges; bottom nav above home indicator
Code_Bad: Swipeable carousel at left edge — triggers iOS back navigation instead
A11y_Note: Edge conflicts prevent some users from using features entirely.
Performance_Note: No performance concern — purely layout consideration.

Description: Show correct keyboard type for each input field
Do: Use inputMode for numeric/email/url/tel. Set autocapitalize and autocorrect.
Don't: Show QWERTY keyboard for phone number field — user switches keyboard
Code_Bad: <input type='text'/> for phone number — shows full QWERTY keyboard
A11y_Note: Correct input type helps all users including assistive tech.
Performance_Note: Zero cost — HTML attributes only.

Description: Prevent iOS Safari auto-zoom on input focus
Do: Set font-size:16px minimum on inputs to prevent iOS zoom on focus.
Don't: Small font on inputs — iOS zooms in; user can't zoom out easily
Code_Bad: <input class='text-xs' /> /* 12px triggers iOS zoom on focus */
A11y_Note: Zoom prevention improves experience for all mobile users.
Performance_Note: No performance cost. Pure CSS font-size rule.

Description: Primary action button floating above content (Material Design)
Do: One FAB per screen for the primary action. Bottom-right position.
Don't: Multiple FABs — user confused which is primary
Code_Good: <button class='fixed bottom-20 right-4 w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-blue-600 shadow-lg' aria-label='Create new'>+</button>
Code_Bad: 3 FABs on screen + overlapping content — cluttered
A11y_Note: aria-label required (icon-only button). 44px+ minimum size.
Performance_Note: Fixed positioning with will-change:transform for smooth scroll.

Description: Vibration/taptic feedback on interactions
Do: Use light haptic on toggle/switch. Medium on destructive action. Heavy on error.
Don't: Haptic on every tap — battery drain and user annoyance
Code_Bad: navigator.vibrate(1000) on button tap — annoying vibration
A11y_Note: Haptic is supplementary — never sole feedback mechanism.
Performance_Note: Minimal battery impact with short vibrations (<50ms).

Description: Placeholder shimmer while content loads
Do: Match skeleton to actual content layout. Animate with shimmer effect.
Don't: Show blank screen or spinner only — no layout hint
Code_Bad: — no layout structure hint
A11y_Note: aria-busy='true' on container. aria-live announces when loaded.
Performance_Note: CSS animation is GPU-accelerated. Lightweight shimmer effect.

Description: Brief non-blocking feedback message
Do: Position at bottom above tab bar. Auto-dismiss 3-5s. Swipe to dismiss.
Don't: Toast behind tab bar — user can't see it
Code_Good: <div class='fixed bottom-20 left-4 right-4 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-lg p-3' role='status'>
Code_Bad: <div class='fixed bottom-0'> — hidden behind bottom navigation bar
A11y_Note: role='status' + aria-live='polite'. Auto-dismiss after reading time.
Performance_Note: Limit to 1 visible toast. Queue additional messages.

Description: Serve appropriately sized images for mobile devices
Do: Use srcset with mobile/tablet/desktop sizes. WebP format. Lazy load below fold.
Don't: Serve 4000px desktop image on 375px phone — wastes 10x bandwidth
Code_Bad: — 5MB image on mobile network
A11y_Note: Alt text required. Lazy loading is a11y compatible.
Performance_Note: Proper sizing reduces image payload 60-80% on mobile.

Description: Respect prefers-reduced-motion OS setting
Do: Disable/reduce animations when user prefers reduced motion.
Don't: Force animations on everyone — motion-sensitive users get nauseous
Code_Bad: Parallax + auto-playing animations with no reduced-motion respect
A11y_Note: Required by WCAG 2.3.3. Prevents motion-triggered vestibular disorders.
Performance_Note: Reduced motion users get faster UI — less GPU animation work.

Description: Handle network disconnection gracefully on mobile
Do: Show offline banner. Cache critical pages. Queue actions for sync.
Don't: Crash or show blank screen on network loss
Code_Good:
You're offline. Changes saved locally.
+ ServiceWorker cache
Code_Bad: navigator.onLine check on load only — no real-time detection; app breaks mid-use
A11y_Note: Announce offline state via role='alert'. Explain what still works.
Performance_Note: Service Worker caching enables offline access. Cache-first for static assets.

Description: Allow zooming on images/maps/content
Do: Enable native pinch zoom on images. Provide zoom controls as alternative.
Don't: Disable viewport zoom — WCAG violation
Code_Bad: <meta name='viewport' content='maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=no'/> — blocks zoom
A11y_Note: Never disable zoom. WCAG 1.4.4 requires 200% zoom support.
Performance_Note: Native zoom is browser-handled — zero JS performance cost.

Description: Zoom into specific content area on double tap
Do: Allow double-tap zoom on images. Prevent on buttons to avoid click delay.
Don't: 300ms click delay from double-tap detection on all elements
Code_Good: on non-zoomable; native zoom on images
Code_Bad: <button style='touch-action:auto'/> — 300ms delay on every button tap
A11y_Note: touch-action:manipulation removes double-tap delay for interactive elements.
Performance_Note: touch-action:manipulation is CSS — zero runtime cost.

Description: Place primary actions in thumb-reachable zone (bottom 1/3 of screen)
Do: Primary CTAs at bottom. Navigation at bottom. Secondary actions at top.
Don't: Critical actions at top of screen — requires hand repositioning
Code_Bad: <button class='absolute top-4 right-4'>Save</button> — unreachable one-handed
A11y_Note: Bottom placement benefits one-handed and limited-reach users.
Performance_Note: No performance concern — layout consideration only.

Description: Page transitions that feel native (slide/fade)
Do: Slide-in for forward navigation. Slide-out for back. Fade for tabs.
Don't: Instant page swaps with no transition — feels jarring
Code_Bad: No transition — page flashes white between routes
A11y_Note: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Skip animation if set.
Performance_Note: CSS transitions only — no JS animation library needed. <16ms frames.

Description: Audio/video player or action bar that persists across screens
Do: Mini player at bottom above tab bar. Expand on tap. Persist across navigation.
Don't: Player disappears on navigate — user loses audio/video context
Code_Good: Mini player
Code_Bad: Player component re-mounts on each page — audio restarts
A11y_Note: Persistent player announced once. State changes via aria-live.
Performance_Note: Keep player in layout root — don't unmount on route change.
